body: Verification on 2026-04-23: python3 scripts/beadbench/run_beadbench.py --dry-run --tier smoke --arm-tier core --limit-arms 2 wrote benchmark-results/beadbench/run-20260423T034154Z-3693848/report.json while a parallel axon dry-run wrote benchmark-results/beadbench/run-20260423T034154Z-3693865/report.json. Later smoke dry-run wrote benchmark-results/beadbench/run-20260423T035041Z-3707769/report.json. This satisfies the uniqueness requirement by adding the process id to run directory names.
summary: same-second dry-runs now write distinct report dirs
